transliterations.transliteration: 勒 līng lâm-hong Siau Guân 帥 An Tìn
laak6/lak6 lim1/ling4/ling6 naam4 fong1 siu1 jyun4 seoi3/seot1 ngon1/on1 zan3
lēi lìng nán fāng xiāo yuán shuài ān zhèn

trans.div: Order Marshal Xiao of the South to secure the town

description.div: It took Lenno and Oliver quite a while to find this general, as it ended up to be behind a wall on private land. Beside this general, there was a withered protective stone. The general is facing the ocean in the east and thus protect the village form dangers coming out of this direction, i.e. the dangers coming from the sea.
